== Notes for [[Item:Q84666|Q84666]] ==

Source 1: http://www.shiachat.com/forum/index.php?/topic/234983816-imam-al-qsim-bin-ibrhm-ar-rassi/

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Al-Hadi_ila'l-Haqq_Yahya

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3144DB9E61EFBC189822EF79916CB60A
geni:6000000011262205184

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
